x="-540" y="-910" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PArHLBpO-sI04EggKvdH-2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1A4E87;fontColor=#FFFFFF;" value="<b style=""><font id="PArHLBpO-sI04EggKvdH-3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00509D;opacity=50;spacingTop=0;fontSize=21;" value="<font><b>Интензивно изгаряне&nbsp;</b></font><div><font><b>на мазнини (Aggressive Cut)</b></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="220" x="-540" y="-800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PArHLBpO-sI04EggKvdH-4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00509D;opacity=50;spacingTop=0;fontSize=21;fontStyle=1" value="<span>Чисто покачване на маса</span><div><span>(Lean Bulk)</span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="220" x="-540" y="-500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PArHLBpO-sI04EggKvdH-5" parent="1"
